github-slot.name: GitHub
github-slot.description: When search results include GitHub repos or users, shows styled info above results.

apiToken.label: GitHub API token
apiToken.description: Personal access token (optional). Without it, API is limited to 60 requests/hour.

maxRepos.label: Max repos to show
maxRepos.description: Maximum number of repo cards to display (1–5).

maxUsers.label: Max users to show
maxUsers.description: Maximum number of user cards to display (1–3).
